title: Oppenheimer upgrades Spotify saying ad monetization could drive stock to $800 Investing.com -- Oppenheimer upgraded Spotify (NYSE:SPOT) to Outperform with a $800 price target on strong upside from user growth, advertising monetization.Shares are up 1.7% at $685.78 on Thus. trading. Spotify shares are down 14% from all-time highs, but Oppenheimer argues that the company has “the longest runway” in large-cap internet, forecasting around 75 million net new users per year from 2026 to 2030.
